mapper.sql: id, instance_name, container_id, image_name, image_tag, algorithm_id, instance_type, cpu_limit, memory_limit, gpu_limit, port_config, env_config, volume_config, instance_status, health_status, start_time, stop_time, restart_count, cpu_usage, memory_usage, gpu_usage, logs_path, created_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, a.name as algorithm_name, u.username as created_by_name FROM vls_container_instance c LEFT JOIN vls_algorithm a ON c.algorithm_id = a.id AND a.is_deleted = 1 WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.is_deleted = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN instance_status = 'running' THEN 1 END) as running_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN instance_status = 'stopped' THEN 1 END) as stopped_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN instance_status = 'error' THEN 1 END) as error_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN instance_status = 'starting' THEN 1 END) as starting_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN instance_status = 'stopping' THEN 1 END) as stopping_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN health_status = 'healthy' THEN 1 END) as healthy_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN health_status = 'unhealthy' THEN 1 END) as unhealthy_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN health_status = 'unknown' THEN 1 END) as unknown_instances, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN cpu_usage IS NOT NULL THEN cpu_usage END), 2) as avg_cpu_usage, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN memory_usage IS NOT NULL THEN memory_usage END), 2) as avg_memory_usage, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gpu_usage IS NOT NULL THEN gpu_usage END), 2) as avg_gpu_usage, COUNT(DISTINCT algorithm_id) as unique_algorithms, COUNT(DISTINCT instance_type) as unique_instance_types, COUNT(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 END) as today_new_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 END) as weekly_new_instances, COUNT(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 END) as monthly_new_instances FROM vls_container_instance WHERE is_deleted = 0
